title: Determine the Minimum Sum of a k-avoiding Array

testcases.input: n = 5, k = 4 Output: 18 Explanation: Consider the k-avoiding array [1,2,4,5,6], which has a sum of 18. It can be proven that there is no k-avoiding array with a sum less than 18.
testcases.expectedOutput: 18 Explanation: Consider the k-avoiding array [1,2,4,5,6], which has a sum of 18. It can be proven that there is no k-avoiding array with a sum less than 18.

testcases.input: n = 2, k = 6 Output: 3 Explanation: We can construct the array [1,2], which has a sum of 3. It can be proven that there is no k-avoiding array with a sum less than 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: We can construct the array [1,2], which has a sum of 3. It can be proven that there is no k-avoiding array with a sum less than 3.
